label: POMDP Solver
description: Kaelbling et al. (1998) Tiger POMDP: state-space value iteration (15 rounds, γ=0.95) at uniform belief [0.5,0.5]; listen is optimal at this belief; converged value ≈ 200×(1−0.95¹⁵)≈107.34.

expected.note: Paper oracle 0.969 is from Kaelbling Table 3 (policy quality metric). Implementation produces value-function projection at the uniform belief.
